title: Add Security Middleware (Helmet, CORS, Rate Limit)
description: Enhance an Express app with production security best practices.
problemStatement:
Take a basic Express API (you can reuse from previous tasks or create a new one) and add the following security middleware:
- `helmet` to set secure headers.
- `cors` configured to allow only a specific origin (e.g., `http://localhost:3001` for development).
- `express-rate-limit` to limit each IP to 100 requests per 15 minutes on all routes.
- Add a global error handler that returns 500 errors as JSON.

Test that:
- The `X-Frame-Options` header is present (check with browser dev tools or curl).
- Requests from disallowed origins are blocked (you can use a tool like Postman with different Origin headers).
- Making many requests quickly triggers the rate limiter (returns 429).

Write a short explanation of each middleware in comments.
hints: Install packages: `npm install helmet cors express-rate-limit`.
Order matters: apply rate limiter before routes, helmet early.
For testing CORS, you can use `curl -H "Origin: http://evil.com" -I http://localhost:3000` and check `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header.
expectedOutput: Secure Express app with headers, CORS, and rate limiting.
